name: tests-as-specs
description: tests-as-specs: the tests are the spec. Three skills, scoping, building-from-plans, and verifying-work.

plugins.name: tests-as-specs
plugins.description: tests-as-specs: the tests are the spec, so there is no prose spec to rot. The human's intent becomes a contract of failing test stubs, each pinning a concrete expected outcome; the build makes them pass; an independent fresh-context review checks the diff against them. Ships scoping (explore the change, interview the human, author a failing stub per requirement, write a short plan and an ADR receipt), building-from-plans (wire each stub into a real assertion and pass it in thin slices, proving each against real behavior, conventional commits), and verifying-work (audit the diff against the plan and its contract, PASS/FAIL). The code and its tests are the only source of truth.
